title: Resinous Shattering Saudi-arabian Hazelnuts En-croute
description: A Saudi-arabian dish featuring shelled hazelnuts, resinous and shattering, served en-croute. This keto-friendly recipe is perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a food processor, grind the hazelnuts and pumpkin seeds into a fine crumb.
In a separate bowl, mix together the dark honey, desiccated coconut, and coconut oil.
Add the egg, salt, and sugar-free baking powder to the bowl and mix well.
Add the ground hazelnut and pumpkin seed mixture to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Place the dough on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and shape into a rectangle.
Drizzle the resin of frankincense over the dough.
Allow the dough to cool before slicing into squares and serving.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
